# PromptArc

PromptArc is a bilingual AI image prompt gallery and prompt-to-image workflow site.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.promptarc.cc/): English AI image prompt gallery with searchable cards.
- [中文首页](https://www.promptarc.cc/zh/): Chinese version of the AI image prompt gallery.
- [Gallery](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/): Full prompt gallery index.
- [生成图片 / Generate](https://www.promptarc.cc/generate/): Prompt-to-image generation workspace.
- [Prompt builder](https://www.promptarc.cc/tool/): Structured image prompt builder.
- [All detail pages](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/detail-pages/): Index of static prompt detail pages.

## Main Collections

- [Product ad prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/product/)
- [Poster prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/poster/)
- [UI prompt examples](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/ui/)
- [Infographic prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/infographic/)
- [Typography prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/typography/)
- [Photography prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/photography/)
- [Character prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/character/)
- [Style test prompts](https://www.promptarc.cc/gallery/test/)

## What The Site Provides

- Original AI image prompt examples paired with generated images.
- Static, crawlable detail pages for each prompt.
- English prompts with bilingual page wrappers.
- Category and topic hubs for product ads, posters, UI, infographics, photography, characters, and style tests.
- A safe prompt-to-image workspace that is designed to call image APIs through a private backend rather than exposing API keys in the browser.

## Technical Discovery

- Sitemap: https://www.promptarc.cc/sitemap.xml
- Image sitemap: https://www.promptarc.cc/image-sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://www.promptarc.cc/robots.txt
